subcodes.title: Letter to Shaykh 'Ali 'Azim
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the creation and the command. He giveth life and causeth death, then causeth death and giveth life, and verily He is the Ever-Living Who dieth not. In His grasp is the dominion of all things; He createth whatsoever He willeth by His command, and verily, He hath power over all things. Indeed, the glory from God resteth upon the people of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الاکبر شهد الله اله لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب هو الاعظم بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر یحیی و یمیت ثم یمیت و یحیی و انه هو حی لا یموت فی قبضته ملکوت کلشیء یخلق ما یشآء بأمره انه کان علی کل شیء قدیراً و انما البهاء القوم من الله فی اصحاب الهدی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
